caption: A person's hands use a white plastic pipe to move objects inside a dirty, cluttered vehicle interior. In the initial scene, the pipe is held horizontally over a metallic, rusted surface and a red object. As the sequence progresses, the pipe is maneuvered across the frame, shifting from the right side toward the center. The area is filled with automotive components, including a metal frame, various wires, and scattered debris on a tan floor. In the final frames, the person's hand is visible gripping the pipe, pushing it toward a red rectangular case and a metallic rim. A white canister with the partial text "NS" is visible on the right side of the lower scene. The lighting is dim, and the camera angle provides a close-up view of the manual manipulation of the pipe within the confined space.
